title: Clear Signing Contract List
description: Schema for lists of contracts compatible with Clear Signing

Version.description: The version of the list, used in change detection

major.description: The major version of the list. Must be incremented when contracts are removed from the list or contract addresses are changed.

minor.description: The minor version of the list. Must be incremented when contracts are added to the list.

patch.description: The patch version of the list. Must be incremented for any changes to the list.

TagIdentifier.description: The unique identifier of a tag

TagDefinition.description: Definition of a tag that can be associated with a contract via its identifier

description.description: A user-friendly description of the tag

ContractInfo.description: Metadata for a single contract in a contract list

chainId.description: The chain ID of the network where this contract is deployed

address.description: The checksummed address of the contract on the specified chain ID

logoURI.description: A URI to the contract logo asset

tags.description: An array of tag identifiers associated with the contract; tags are defined at the list level

name.description: The name of the contract list

timestamp.description: The timestamp of this list version; i.e. when this immutable version of the list was created

contracts.description: The list of contracts included in the list

keywords.description: Keywords associated with the contents of the list; may be used in list discoverability

items.description: A keyword to describe the contents of the list

tags.description: A mapping of tag identifiers to their definitions

stablecoin.name: Stablecoin
stablecoin.description: A token with value pegged to another asset

logoURI.description: A URI for the logo of the token list; suggest SVG or PNG of size 256x256
